key_decisions_and_rationale: Use the existing native media gateway flow instead of a separate Grok route to preserve keyless native access, credential stripping, job polling, cancel/timeout semantics, and same-origin asset URLs.

Catalog ID remains native.grok.imagine-video rather than hard-coding 1.5 because the local Grok CLI wrapper is the integration surface and official REST docs split image-to-video from reference-to-video model support.
Default to no new shared adapter utilities; add one only if the Grok adapter creates concrete duplication in touched code.
Use Graphify before implementation and again after meaningful code changes to keep codebase navigation and durable graph state current.
